title: allium atrorubens
intro: Allium atrorubens, also known as black garlic or black onion, is a species of wild garlic native to China. The plant contains compounds with potential medicinal properties, including antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allium atrorubens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allium atrorubens include fresh or dried leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
